description: VayaPin MCP: pin resolution + Google Maps geocoding/places + AfterShip tracking, with BYOK.
name: app.vayapin/mcp

environmentVariables.description: VayaPin Personal Access Token, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer'. Generate one on the VayaPin developer portal (POST /api/v1/auth/pat/request).
environmentVariables.name: VAYAPIN_PAT

environmentVariables.description: Optional tool-slice name to expose a subset of tools (128-tool client ceiling lift). Unset exposes all tools.
environmentVariables.name: VAYAPIN_MCP_SLICE

environmentVariables.description: Override the VayaPin API base URL for staging or self-host.
environmentVariables.name: VAYAPIN_MCP_API_URL
